name: Jim Zogby, Our Revolution
subject: Finally, Unity and Reform
body:
In yesterday's final Unity Reform Commission meeting, we sent the DNC key recommendations including
#
Friends,
Over the past year, I and seven other members appointed by Senator Bernie Sanders participated in the DNC's Unity Reform Commission. While it was not an easy process, we worked to make much needed, and long overdue, changes to how the Democratic Party operates.
In yesterday's final Unity Reform Commission meeting, we sent the DNC key recommendations including:
* Reducing the number of unpledged "superdelegates" in the presidential nominating process by 60 percent.
* Electoral reforms and a process for rewarding states that have same-day registration, same-day party change, open primaries, and other measures that increase civic participation.
* Commitment to reevaluating allocation formulas so primary and caucus winners receive more pledged delegates.
* Commitment to reexamine the primary calendar, and offer incentives to states to ensure the calendar is appropriately spread out so voters in each state receive the necessary exposure to the candidates.
* Steps toward financial transparency and oversight, the creation of an Ombudsman Committee, and strengthening the conflict of interest provision.

These recommendations are a start and our discussion of these topics over the past year have brought new voices to our side. Members of the political establishment have also joined the call for reform. Senator Tim Kaine, who was Secretary Clinton's running mate in 2016, has come out in favor of eliminating superdelegates from the presidential nominating process. This is a good start, but there are still far too many who resist change and seek to uphold the status quo.
[**Donate $5 to Our Revolution and help us continue the fight to open the Democratic Party to all people.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7adde/bed43eb/2286342f/75ff7bcd/2607567468/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-dnc?refcode=em171210-full&noskip=true")
Our Revolution is building solidarity with grassroots organizations across the country. Just last week, Senator Bernie Sanders and Our Revolution president Nina Turner held rallies across Kentucky, Ohio, and Pennsylvania rallying Americans against the GOP tax bill. These efforts are critical, but the Unity Reform Commission must affect change here in Washington if our organizing efforts are to be successful in the long term.
We are fighting for racial, social, economic, and environmental justice. The Democratic Party needs everyone, regardless of their race, religion, gender, sexual orientation, age, ability, country of origin, language, or socioeconomic status, to be deeply involved in order to change the course of this country. That's why we are calling for an end to superdelegates, open primaries and caucuses, same-day registration, and more transparent, fair, and accountable leadership at the helm of the DNC.
[**Make a $5 contribution to Our Revolution as we work in Washington to bring real, meaningful reforms to the DNC this weekend.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7adde/bed43eb/2286342f/75ff7bcd/2607567468/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-dnc?refcode=em171210-full&noskip=true")
Your generous support helps build the foundation upon which the people of this country can champion the issues that brought our movement together. Thank you.
In solidarity,
Jim Zogby
Our Revolution Board Member
DNC Unity Reform Commission Member

name: The White House
subject: Our long journey to the stars—and the Moon
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=3a4c26b4047e66dedaf6000134190f17daa05ea4b4cbfae38f72574d74649b5bf931ab4d50ab255fbc1d2656d82f0301e3f73a344c423c3f

Our long journey to the stars—and the Moon

Forty-five years ago today, NASA’s final Apollo mission landed on the surface of the Moon. No human has walked there since.

This afternoon, President Donald J. Trump will tell the country that it’s time to refocus our vision for American space exploration.

In signing Space Policy Directive 1 today—the first recommendation of the recently reconvened National Space Council—the President will shift NASA’s resources and attention toward the Moon and Mars. Given its relative closeness, the Moon in particular offers humans the best hope for long-term exploration and utilization.

President Ronald Reagan once eloquently captured the sweep of mankind as “his long climb from the swamp to the stars.” With President Trump’s order today, America commits itself once again to writing the next chapter of that story.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=3a4c26b4047e66deba434322069ad224fb5f4c2714256c1940d8bba2b01ecf49433fcd2c9e36d807db6f62d7306080551104c351fb734bc2
Watch the signing ceremony today at 3:00 p.m. EST.

‘The sacred birthright of equality’

President Trump listened closely as Reuben Anderson, Mississippi's first African-American Supreme Court justice, led a small tour group through the newly opened Mississippi Civil Rights Museum on Saturday.

"The [civil rights] movement was very uncomfortable," Museum Director Pamela Junior says, adding that guests should feel some of that discomfort to better understand what victims went through.

“The Civil Rights Museum records the oppression, cruelty and injustice inflicted on the African-American community,” President Trump said, as well as “the fight to end slavery, to break down Jim Crow, to end segregation, to gain the right to vote, and to achieve the sacred birthright of equality here.”

“Their memories are carved in stone as American heroes.”

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=3a4c26b4047e66de5d930cf10e94244ad3e72660736f15e582a5f8a5c64623e3746f7e89aa79e028f430d87e0d1bad1efc930432a2ccc81a
Read the President’s full remarks here.

A look inside the White House at Christmas

The First Family has opened the White House to thousands of guests this holiday season for open houses and Christmas receptions. But to bring the experience of Christmas at the White House to many more, we’ll be sharing “360 Photos” this month that allow you to take a look around without having to book a ticket to Washington.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=3a4c26b4047e66de6beab29defb04d85cda6b1d82b9ce3d4c783e8303943b08ce821b6893c47234c5f27b3761f65a4250c6ed0d09651c14b
Our first 360 Photo offers a glimpse at the East Colonnade. Follow the White House on Facebook to see the full set as they are released.

Photo of the Day

First Lady Melania Trump visits with children for Christmas at Children’s National Hospital | December 7, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks)

POTUS TODAY

Today, President Trump will have lunch with Vice President Mike Pence and Secretary of Agriculture Sonny Perdue. This afternoon, the President will participate in a presentation of the Friends of Zion award with Faith Leaders.

Later, the President will participate in a swearing-in ceremony for Jamie McCourt as the U.S. Ambassador to France and the U.S. Ambassador to Monaco.

Vice President Pence will participate in the swearing-in ceremony for Peter Hoekstra as the U.S. Ambassador to the Netherlands and Duke Buchan as the U.S. Ambassador to Spain and Andorra.

COMING UP

Tomorrow, the President will sign the National Defense Authorization Act.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=3a4c26b4047e66decdbf32b0d1c66c397fcd2655d7d2d79630dbf1d1381e5140d0e1fdd68e259a2da875be32e1a35172bf8f125df13cdb10
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=3a4c26b4047e66de3d7a30da7f214b4642880471023886ee666dd4dec730b157edd371fa8bbcfdf766c3c5c4cedf3fcb117cd94869c192d0
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4a08de0771ff02c6e5b9ae926a45cde8aac12be5979f4d142da44030320eb0a71a218695175cb71d9385d41113166bf3e

name: Virginia Election Update
subject: BREAKING: Yet another extremist officially enters VA race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Tim Kaine now has three Republicans trying to defeat him next November. We've already got Corey Stewart, the anti-immigrant, confederate-sympathizing "mini-Trump," and Nick Freitas, the anti-LGBTQ NRA shill -- both of whom want to serve as a rubber stamp for President Trump's extreme agenda in Virginia. **[Now, after teasing his run with a quiet website update last week, E.W. Jackson is officially in, too.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Sy%2BpHbS8hmUMM4V7Sbtep3tVheKxERc9)**

You may think that a third opponent getting into this race would be more moderate... but you would be wrong. As Tim's research director, I spend a LOT of time looking into these guys, so I know exactly who we're dealing with. Here are the highlights:

E.W. Jackson, like many Republicans, wants to defund Planned Parenthood. But unlike almost anyone else, he has also called it "far more lethal to black lives than the KKK ever was." Fact check: Planned Parenthood is one of the critical health organizations that provides access to care to many minority communities. He has called President Obama "the Antichrist." As for LGBTQ people? Jackson says they're "very sick" and "perverted."

**[This guy is beyond out-of-touch -- he's extremely offensive, dangerous, and would embarrass Virginia.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=qHnuwGkX7JbWkTlt7A1093tVheKxERc9)**

No matter which of these three extreme candidates Tim faces next year, it's clear that the Republican Party of Virginia doesn't have much to offer hardworking families in the Commonwealth. Their candidates would rather demonize our friends and neighbors than offer good ideas to help people.

**But that doesn't mean it's going to be a cake walk. Special interests will pour money into this race to try to take Tim out of the Senate.[To fight back, he needs every supporter to chip in $15 right now.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=JH%2BkFFJE53ZCaf6Gp1kQQ3tVheKxERc9)**

Let's show E.W. Jackson, Nick Freitas, Corey Stewart, and everyone else watching Virginia with a close eye that we're ready to build a *huge* grassroots movement behind Tim.

Thanks for your help. I'll keep you posted with the latest updates on our opponents.

-Megan

Megan Apper, Team Kaine Research Director

We've already got Corey Stewart, the anti-immigrant, confederate-sympathizing "mini-Trump," and Nick Freitas, the anti-LGBTQ NRA shill -- both of whom want to serve as a rubber stamp for President Trump's extreme agenda in Virginia. You may think that a third opponent getting into this race would be more moderate... but you would be wrong. As Tim's research director, I spend a LOT of time looking into these guys, so I know exactly who we're dealing with. Here are the highlights: E.W. Jackson, like many Republicans, wants to defund Planned Parenthood. But unlike almost anyone else, he has also called it "far more lethal to black lives than the KKK ever was." As for LGBTQ people? Jackson says they're "very sick" and "perverted." clean_body: This invasive witch hunt is outrageous and I am doing everything I can to spread the word. I hope you read the email below and chip in if you can. Friend, did you get my email? This invasive witch hunt is outrageous and I am doing everything I can to spread the word. With news like this, it’s time to stand for freedom. We deserve the right to privacy. And if I’m fortunate enough to be your U.S. Senator, you can count on me to stand up for your Constitutional rights. Thank you, friend. Leah Friend, conservatives are being targeted. And that's not just a talking point. It's not just a political statement. It's a reality for too many of us, including me. This week the Wisconsin Department of Justice released a report that revealed unaccountable liberal bureaucrats at the Government Accountability Board hacked and collected my emails that go back as far back as 2009! Not just work emails, friend, but even personal emails with my daughter that included private medical information were collected as part of the John Doe witch hunts. I know I'm not the only one. And I want everyone to hear about this terrible invasion of privacy. I don’t want this to happen to anyone else, and I didn’t let it. That’s why, even before I knew I was a target, I authored the law that eliminated the GAB. That’s also why I worked with Governor Walker and my legislative colleagues to reform our John Doe laws. Friend, I am horrified to learn how invasive this witch hunt was. It made its way into nearly every part of every major Wisconsin conservative’s life. Our private information was even stored in a file titled “opposition research” -- and you know they wanted to use whatever information they could to destroy us politically. No political motivation justifies this. We have to fight back and continue to spread the word on this major failure of government accountability. Our freedoms are at stake, and you can count on me to stand up for you. Thank you, Friend. Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: "vote or die"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| __
Tomorrow's special Senate election in Alabama will determine if accused child molester and right wing extremist Roy Moore will take a seat in the U.S. Senate.

In recent days, more news about Moore's extremist views has continued to roll in, including a 2011 videotaped statement in which Moore argues it would "eliminate many problems" if the U.S. got rid of EVERY constitutional amendment after the first 10 -- which would include amendments abolishing slavery and giving the right to vote to people regardless of skin color or gender.

The stakes could not be higher. In parts of Selma, Alabama, today, streets are lined with lawn signs urging people to "VOTE OR DIE." _Electing Roy Moore would be a new low for the U.S. Senate -- and for our country._

[**In recent days, President Trump and the RNC have thrown their support and money behind Roy Moore -- but we are fighting back. We don't want to leave anything on the table in this critical election. Can you help in the final push to elect Democrat Doug Jones in Alabama?**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b8a/70cdc2ba/46d0a92e/39026bd/2200219983/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvh-alspecial?refcode=CVH_EM_FR_FULL_171211&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+In+recent+days+President+Trump+and+the+R&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_FR_FULL_171211&source=CVH_EM_FR_FULL_171211")

It is shameful and outrageous that so many Republicans have been unwilling to speak out against Moore in these final weeks because they are desperate to keep every vote possible in the Senate, so they can push through their extreme anti-worker, anti-middle class agenda.

And it's not only our economic security that's on the ballot -- it's the safety of our families as well. It is unconscionable and shameful that, in the wake of the massacres in Las Vegas and Sutherland Springs, House Republicans voted once again last week to do the bidding of the NRA and allow even more guns to flow across state lines. I will do everything I can to stop this measure in the Senate.

[**Our safety and economic security are on the ballot tomorrow in Alabama. Donate now and help fight back against these dangerous Republican policies >>**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b8a/70cdc2ba/46d0a92e/39026ba/2200219983/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvh-alspecial?refcode=CVH_EM_FR_FULL_171211&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Our+safety+and+economic+security+are+on+&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_FR_FULL_171211&source=CVH_EM_FR_FULL_171211")

A win tomorrow will also send a message that Americans will stand against those who value the interests of wealthy donors over the safety and economic security of the American people.

Thank you for fighting with me. I promise I will never stop fighting for what is right, and for a Senate that will stand up for American values.

Chris Van Hollen
U.S. Senator

---

---
Van Hollen for Senate
10605 Concord Street, Suite 202
Kensington, MD 20895

Thank you for standing with Chris!

name: LegitPAC Team
subject: ICYMI: I want to hear it from you
body:
[ Legit ]LegitPAC

Friend,

Tomorrow morning, we’re sitting down with Russ to decide which
candidate we should support next. There’s only a few hours left until
we close suggestions.

[ https://act.legitaction.com/letter/suggest_a_candidate/?t=1002&akid=452%2E356062%2EtMNx5Q ]If you haven’t yet, suggest a candidate to LegitPAC before we sit
down with Russ to decide on who to support next.

Fellow members have submitted a number of strong options so far, but
there’s still time for a few more suggestions to be useful. Thank you
for speaking up.

LegitPAC Team

------Original Message------
From: Russ Feingold, LegitPAC
Subject: I want to hear it from you

Friend,

If you could ask your fellow Legit members to join you in supporting
one candidate for office anywhere in the United States, who would you
choose?

I’m reaching out to you because we want suggestions from members about
where to direct the next round of campaign resources to make the
biggest impact.

Do you know a candidate who’s deeply committed to voting rights?
Fighting for transparency? Facing an opponent who would be especially
toxic to legitimacy?

Tell us which candidate you think needs our support and why, and the
next time we ask hundreds of thousands of Legit members nationwide to
support someone, it might just be the candidate you suggest.

members like you.

decide which candidate we should focus on supporting next. We’ll look

pool, we’ll make sure to weigh it.

Whether you suggest someone that wasn’t even on our radar or someone

Sharing your suggestion with us won’t just inform which candidate we
select. It also helps us to elevate the voices of you and your fellow
supporters in our ongoing fight for the legitimacy of America’s
democratic system.

Thanks for standing up for democratic legitimacy today,

Russ Feingold

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
Peter, Republicans in Congress are still fighting to pass the McConnell tax plan, but Paul Ryan and his extremist allies like Congressman Messer and Congressman Rokita are already movi |
---

| | **"Republicans to target... Medicare, Medicaid spending in 2018"
_Washington Post_ , 12/6/17
[Chip in to help Joe stop them >>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c25fd/7377f838/321d18b5/51fa49b8/2575150945/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-medicaredec?refcode=20171211nd&amount=10")** Peter, Republicans in Congress are still fighting to pass the McConnell tax plan, but Paul Ryan and his extremist allies like Congressman Messer and Congressman Rokita are already moving onto their next target. They've got a busy 2018 planned carrying out the agenda of their special interest donors -- and first up on the list is **_cutting Medicare by hundreds of billions of dollars_** to pay for the McConnell tax bill.

**This shouldn 't be a surprise: it's been Ryan's dream to strip seniors of their health care since he came to Congress.** He became a darling of the extreme right by writing budgets that would end Medicare as we know it, forcing older Hoosiers to dig into their hard-earned retirements just to pay for basic care.

Peter, this is completely unacceptable. Older Americans have been paying into this program for decades. They're counting on our government to uphold their end of the bargain -- that if you work hard and play by the rules, you deserve strong, stable health care when you retire. But if Paul Ryan, Mitch McConnell, and Congressmen Messer and Rokita have their way, that'll be next on the chopping block.

**Chip in today to stand up to Mitch McConnell and remind him that cutting Medicare is NEVER acceptable.** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Joe's fighting for Hoosiers, not Washington special interests. He's made where he stands perfectly clear: he'll never support any proposal that cuts Medicare or Social Security for those who have earned it. Joe knows we can't let Congress go back on the promises we've made to our seniors.

But Joe needs people like **YOU** , who realize how important Medicare is. People who know that enacting something like Paul Ryan's budget next year would be a disaster for tens of millions of Americans who have nowhere else to turn for their health care. He's counting on us to step up, dig in, and tell Washington Republicans that Medicare is off-limits.

**We need your help today. Your contribution will help keep Joe in the Senate fighting for Hoosiers and protecting Medicare for those who need it most.[Can you donate $5 today?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c25fd/7377f838/321d18b5/51fa49b8/2575150945/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-medicaredec?refcode=20171211nd&amount=10")**

Team Donnelly

#
Friends,
Our Revolution opened our online store just in time for the holidays, and we want to make sure you have an opportunity to place your order to receive it in time! **December 15 is the final day to receive your shipment by the end of the year.**
[**Visit our online store today and purchase our official, union-made merchandise before December 15!**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7addc/bed43eb/215f336d/75ff7ac1/4202773144/VEsH/ "https://shop.ourrevolution.com/?source=em171211-suba")

In solidarity,
Nina Turner

subject: Stop the NRA [signature needed]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf87/2a380d31/1f1c6c2/fe3d6b/3362438239/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf87/2a380d31/1f1c6c2/fe3d6b/3362438239/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Hello,
Last week, just before the five-year anniversary of the Sandy Hook Elementary School shooting that left 26 dead, House Republicans voted to make it easier for domestic abusers and criminals to carry concealed weapons across state lines.
Five years after Sandy Hook and one month from the devastating mass shootings in Las Vegas and in Sutherland Springs, Texas, and far-right Republicans are STILL putting the NRA's wishes ahead of the basic safety of American families.
**We can 't let the NRA stop us from strengthening gun safety and saving lives. [Please sign our petition calling on Congress to reject the NRA and act on gun violence.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf87/2a380d31/1f1c6c2/fe3d54/3362438239/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/RejecttheNRA/?code=hassan&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Freject-the-nra-upsell&firstname=lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")**
The NRA has said that passing this bill, the Concealed Carry Reciprocity Act, is its "highest legislative priority."
If the Concealed Carry Reciprocity Act becomes law, people will be able to bring their weapons on national park lands, and domestic abusers will be able to bring guns back across state lines.
[**Please, sign our petition to tell Congress to make America safer, not kowtow to the NRA.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf87/2a380d31/1f1c6c2/fe3d54/3362438239/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/RejecttheNRA/?code=hassan&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Freject-the-nra-upsell&firstname=lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
Thank you for taking action,
Team Maggie

subject: Members' choice: Pick our official 2018 Membership Card >>

We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6f30/24c69fd9/154857816/189080ac/714599100/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQENRL16N_digital_email_20171211_MembershipCardVote1_inact&source=WQENRL16N_digital_email_20171211_MembershipCardVote1_inact")
---

Peter,

There's one last thing you need to vote on before the year is over: Our 2018 Membership Card!

We've got three potential designs, but we can only print one.

**[Vote for your favorite design now-- and then make a donation to get the winning card and become a 2018 EMILY's List member.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6f30/24c69fd9/154857816/189080ad/714599100/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20171211_email_MembershipCardVote?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Vote+for+your+favorite+design+now+mdash+&utm_campaign=WQENRL16N_digital_email_20171211_MembershipCardVote1_inact&source=WQENRL16N_digital_email_20171211_MembershipCardVote1_inact")**
[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6f30/24c69fd9/154857816/189080ae/714599100/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20171211_email_MembershipCardVote?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=WQENRL16N_digital_email_20171211_MembershipCardVote1_inact&source=WQENRL16N_digital_email_20171211_MembershipCardVote1_inact")
We loved all three of these designs so much, we couldn't make up our minds about which one to print for 2018.

So it's up to you to decide!

I can't wait to see which design you pick.

**Help choose the EMILY's List 2018 Membership Card design -- and then donate to become a 2018 member and get your card: **

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Choose-Your-Favorite](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6f30/24c69fd9/154857816/189080af/714599100/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20171211_email_MembershipCardVote?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgChooseYourFavori&utm_campaign=WQENRL16N_digital_email_20171211_MembershipCardVote1_inact&source=WQENRL16N_digital_email_20171211_MembershipCardVote1_inact")**

Thanks,

Kelly Biggs
Membership Services Manager, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6f30/24c69fd9/154857816/189080a8/714599100/VEsD/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20171211_email_MembershipCardVote-upsell?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=WQENRL16N_digital_email_20171211_MembershipCardVote1_inact&source=WQENRL16N_digital_email_20171211_MembershipCardVote1_inact")

\---
If you've donated recently, with a different email address, or offline to become a 2018 member, thank you! It can take several days to process memberships, but don't worry, we have it recorded.

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
